steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the researchers' hypothesis: shimmering is a specialized defense response to hornets (not observed with other predators).

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
B expresses the researchers' hypothesis precisely.
  • A falsely claims researchers are unsure
  • C treats the hypothesis as established predator fact
  • D introduces other species not mentioned
. That matches choice B — B is correct.
